summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact hydrated 20 of 25 listed PRs; no canonical was provided and the job explicitly says not to invent one. Hydrated PRs are classified conservatively as independent/related inventory items with no closure or merge recommendation. Five listed PRs were not present in the hydrated artifact and need live-state hydration before a target_updated_at-backed classification can be completed.
